name: DeviceMitra AI Repair Intelligence Registry
purpose: Single source of truth for public guide pages, sample report previews, safety copy, and early-access CTAs.
rules: Possible causes are not confirmed diagnoses.
Household users are not instructed to perform hazardous tests.
Electrical, refrigerant, fuel, brake, and structural risks escalate conservatively.
No page claims expert review until a real reviewer is recorded.
No public claim exceeds the currently usable product capability.

guides.symptom: AC trips MCB when switched on
guides.capabilityStatus: educational guide with illustrative early-access report preview
safeObservations: Burning smell or water near wiring
prohibitedInstructions: Open electrical panels as household user
guides.reviewStatus: needs technical and safety review before expert-review claim

guides.capabilityStatus: educational guide with illustrative early-access report preview
safeObservations: Blade movement after power is off
prohibitedInstructions: Open fan canopy with power connected
Continue using fan with burning smell or loose mount

guides.symptom: Self-start clicks but engine does not crank
guides.capabilityStatus: educational guide with illustrative early-access report preview
possibleFaults: Starter relay or starter motor issue
prohibitedInstructions: Ride with battery leak, fuel smell, smoke, or burning smell
guides.reviewStatus: needs technical and safety review before expert-review claim
